scenarios.name: Lightsail pilot, encrypted managed PostgreSQL
scenarios.description: Lowest fixed-cost AWS pilot: one Linux container/VM tier plus encrypted Lightsail PostgreSQL, using in-process realtime/rate-limit fallbacks until scaling requires managed Redis/DynamoDB.

items.name: Lightsail Linux/Unix 2 GB bundle
Lightsail managed database 2 GB standard, encrypted
S3 evidence/audit storage starter allowance
ECR private repository image storage starter allowance
CloudWatch logs and alarms starter allowance
SES pilot mail volume allowance
Cognito Lite/Essentials under direct-user free tier

notes: Not high availability. Do not use for an HA production SLA without adding a second app node/load balancer and a high availability database plan.
The 1 GB Lightsail database plan is cheaper but has no data encryption on the current pricing page; PH-OS should start at the encrypted 2 GB plan.

scenarios.name: ECS Express/Fargate role-capable minimum
scenarios.description: Managed container runtime direction for new AWS customers that need task-role credentials for DynamoDB, Secrets Manager, S3, or SES without long-lived keys. Uses one 0.25 vCPU/0.5 GB Linux/x86 Fargate task, one Application Load Balancer, and the same encrypted PostgreSQL placeholder.

items.name: Fargate Linux/x86 vCPU 0.25 x 730h Tokyo
Fargate Linux/x86 memory 0.5 GB x 730h Tokyo
Application Load Balancer hourly charge x 730h Tokyo
Application Load Balancer starter 1 LCU x 730h Tokyo
Encrypted PostgreSQL monthly placeholder
S3 evidence/audit storage starter allowance
ECR private repository image storage starter allowance
CloudWatch logs and alarms starter allowance
DynamoDB rate-limit/Yjs starter allowance
SES pilot mail volume allowance
Cognito Lite/Essentials under direct-user free tier

notes: AWS says App Runner is no longer open to new customers as of April 30, 2026 and recommends Amazon ECS Express Mode for containerized applications.
ECS Express Mode has no additional charge; the estimate counts the underlying Fargate, Application Load Balancer, CloudWatch, data-transfer-adjacent, and data-store resources.
RDS PostgreSQL pricing depends on the selected DB instance class, storage, backups, and Multi-AZ choice; keep this as a placeholder until a concrete RDS size is selected in AWS Pricing Calculator.
The Fargate and ALB line items use AWS Price List API Tokyo rates observed on 2026-06-17; refresh them before procurement or production approval.

scenarios.name: Production HA floor
scenarios.description: Minimum direction for production HA: two app instances behind a load balancer and a high-availability encrypted database. Redis/WebSocket/DynamoDB can be enabled when multi-instance realtime needs it.

items.name: Two Lightsail Linux/Unix 2 GB bundles
Lightsail load balancer
Lightsail managed database 2 GB high availability, encrypted
S3 evidence/audit storage starter allowance
ECR private repository image storage starter allowance
CloudWatch logs and alarms starter allowance
DynamoDB rate-limit/Yjs starter allowance
SES pilot mail volume allowance
Cognito Lite/Essentials under direct-user free tier

notes: This is a floor estimate, not a compliance sign-off. Add WAF, CloudTrail data events, KMS request volume, backups, and support plan before production approval.
If strict RDS parameter controls/pgaudit are required, replace Lightsail DB with RDS PostgreSQL in private subnets and recalculate.
